full_text:
Mao Zeng 毛曾
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mao Zeng (毛曾). Brother-in-law to Cao Rui. Despised by Xiahou Xuan. Mao Zeng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
